name: Fujitomi Co.,Ltd.
summary: Fujitomi Co.,Ltd. engages in the commodity futures trading business in Japan. It is also involved in the online commodity trading business; life insurance, and property and casualty insurance agency business; gold bullion sale business; sale of LED lighting products; and real estate leasing, and residential land and building trading business. The company was founded in 1952 and is incorporated in Tokyo, Japan. Fujitomi Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Kobayashi Yoko Co., Ltd.
